commands.review_summary:
Adds a managed npm-root repair helper that removes stale root `openclaw` dependency, lockfile, and package state before non-`openclaw` npm plugin installs, with regression tests and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: no. not as a high-confidence live reproduction in this read-only review. Source inspection shows the plausible path: current main can leave `openclaw` in managed root/package-lock while beta plugin updates are expected to resolve `@openclaw/*@beta`, and the PR adds unit-level reproduction coverage for that state.
commands.review_followup: Draft protected maintainer PR with no narrow automated repair request; maintainers should mark it ready, review it, and run the appropriate validation before merge.

target.title: fix(plugins): repair stale managed openclaw peers
